com.jsyn.ports

Interface SettablePort

  • All Superinterfaces:
    GettablePort
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    UnitGatePort, UnitInputPort, UnitVariablePort

    public interface SettablePort
extends GettablePort
    Port whose parts can be set.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2009 Mobileer Inc
